trend.summary: Hennur search interest is declining from a 12-month average of 71.6 to recent interest of 63.5, indicating softening demand. However, 6 rising related queries suggest emerging micro-trends around specific landmarks (Hennur Lake, Hennur Gardens) and healthcare facilities (Sparsh Hospital).

aeo_targets.our_strategy: Create comprehensive hospital directory with Sparsh Hospital details, specialties, contact info, and reviews. Include comparison with other nearby hospitals. Optimize for local pack and AI overview.
Build restaurant guide with categorized listings (cafes, fine dining, casual), reviews, cuisines, and location maps. Target local pack and AI overview with structured data.
Create schools directory with top schools, ratings, fees, specializations, and parent reviews. Optimize for local pack and featured snippet.
Create property listings hub with current market prices, project details, builder information, and investment analysis. Include price trends and comparison with nearby areas.
Build rental market guide with current rent prices by BHK, locality-wise breakdown, and rental trends. Include landlord/tenant guides.
Create specific rental guide for 2BHK apartments with price ranges, popular complexes, and neighborhood comparisons.
Expand AI overview content with detailed activities guide covering parks, lakes, restaurants, entertainment, and day-trip options. Include visitor reviews and ratings.
Enhance existing knowledge with Canvas Homes perspective: create comprehensive locality guide covering all aspects (location, property, lifestyle, infrastructure). Aim to be cited in AI overviews.
Create authoritative guide competing with KOTS and Puravankara. Include property market data, lifestyle, infrastructure, and investment potential. Optimize for AI overview citation.
Create detailed living guide with pros/cons, cost of living, lifestyle factors, community insights, and family suitability. Include real resident perspectives and Canvas Homes data.
